accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: ID of the account to link the task to (optional), Contact/Account

contactId.title: Contact ID
contactId.description: ID of the contact to link the task to

description.title: Description
description.description: Task description, ,optional -Do not insist user to input this value if user is not providing

dueDate.title: Due Date
dueDate.description: Task due date , ,optional -Do not insist user to input this value if user is not providing if not provided default as today

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Task priority (High, Normal, Low), optional -Do not insist user to input this value if user is not providing

status.title: Status
status.description: Task status (Not Started, In Progress, Completed),optional -Do not insist user to input this value if user is not providing

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: Task subject, ,optional -Do not insist user to input this value if user is not providing, take a subject that suits the context
